items.title: Advantages
items.text:
I write texts that solve business problems and help the target audience.

Technical writer turned documentation leader with 12 years of experience across cybersecurity, big tech, and government IT. I work where complexity meets communication — turning technical depth into texts that actually gets used.

Today, at the IT Department od Moscow, I design documentation workflows and develop the people who run them.

Writing it's not just a job, it's more of a passion.

Content creation Command management Process optimization Cybersecurity

docs-as-code Python 3d-printing

items.title: The IT Department of Moscow
items.text: Commercial activities April 2025 — present Head of the Competence Center for the Preparation of Technical Documentation

items.title: Tasks
items.text:
• Designing BPMN workflows and contributing to the implementation of standards for technical documentation
  • Coordinating a team of technical writers, overseeing content quality, task distribution, and delivery timelines.
  • Managing preparation of accounting and compliance documentation for government contracts, ensuring accuracy and adherence to regulatory requirements.
  • Improving documentation capabilities within the team, supporting skill development and raising overall content quality standards.

items.title: MTS, Innovation Unit
items.text: Information technology, system integration, Internet March 2024 — March 2025 (1 year) Head of the Technical Writers Group

items.title: Tasks
items.text:
• Managed the internal product knowledge base in Confluence, ensuring documentation consistency and accessibility across teams.
  • Prepared and published product release notes, communicating key updates, fixes, and feature changes to stakeholders.
  • Prepared certification documentation in compliance with internal and regulatory requirements.
  • Coordinated external documentation vendors and contributors, ensuring delivery quality and adherence to project standards.
  • Contributed to the development of an LLM- and GraphRAG-based tool, supporting AI-driven knowledge retrieval and information processing.

items.title: Group-IB
items.text: Information Security June 2022 — February 2024 (1 year 9 months) Leader of the Technical communications team

items.title: Tasks
items.text:
• Implemented an open-source tool to replace a complex internal solution, reducing development overhead and simplifying maintenance.
  • Coordinated task tracking across four systems, including JIRA and GitLab, improving workflow visibility and cross-team alignment.
  • Contributed to the implementation of the RASCI responsibility model, clarifying ownership and improving accountability within the team.
  • Improved efficiency of the technical communications team, enhancing delivery speed and documentation quality.

items.title: VKontakte
items.text: Digital Services december 2018 — May 2022 (3 years 6 months) Leading Technical Writer

items.title: Tasks
items.text:
• Implemented Swagger-based API documentation for internal services, reducing onboarding time for QA engineers by 30%.
  • Documented core functionality of the VKontakte Ads service, translating technical processes into structured product documentation.
  • Developed and standardized a project documentation style guide to ensure consistency across technical materials.
  • Maintained and structured the team knowledge base in Confluence, improving information accessibility and collaboration efficiency.
  • Automated documentation deployment workflows using Jenkins, enabling continuous updates of the documentation website.

items.title: FORCE
items.text: Information Technology february 2016 — November 2018 (2 years 10 months) Senior Engineer

items.title: Tasks
items.text:
• Implemented Oracle Identity Management solutions in two banks, supporting internal information security processes.
  • Prepared technical documentation, including user guides, operational manuals, and supporting materials.
  • Developed role-based access control (RBAC) models for multiple bank divisions.
  • Prepared training materials and conducted user training sessions on Oracle IDM for bank employees.
  • Developed connectors in Java for system integration and identity synchronization.

items.title: Citibank
items.text: Banking sector jul 2012 — June 2014 (2 years) Specialist of the Department of Operational Control, Information Security and tracking of suspicious transactions

items.title: Tasks
items.text:
• Analyzed bank applications logs for information security policy violations, identifying and documenting compliance issues.
  • Coordinated with the Kazakhstan branch during verification of regional financial reporting, supporting cross-office communication and audit processes.
  • Developed an Excel-based tracking system for monitoring regular employee compliance checks.
  • Tested system migration to the unified Rainbow information platform, validating functionality and data transfer processes.
